pr.title: Record: XSA-all + Depth Recurrence + Hedge Mixer TTT (val_bpb=1.0278, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: Applies XSA everywhere along with value residuals, depth recurrence, and CROWN-Q while using Hedge Mixer score-first TTT scoring.
techniques: - Depth recurrence creates 13 virtual layers for richer modeling
- CROWN-Q curvature-aware regularization before int6 quant
- GPU Hedge Mixer blends neural and n-gram experts during score-first TTT
